creator: randomnoise058@gmail.com
text:
libtiff .la files specify lib dependencies that use "/usr/local/lib" for lzma when it resides in "/usr/lib" (base system installation). This may be the cause of other graphics application source compilations failing with "/usr/local/lib/liblzma.la: No such file or directory":

CCLD ltdl/libltdlc.la
CCLD magick/libMagickCore.la
grep: /usr/local/lib/liblzma.la: No such file or directory
sed: /usr/local/lib/liblzma.la:No such file or directory
libtool: link:`/usr/local/lib/liblzma.la' is not a valid libtool archive
gmake[1]: *** [magick/libMagickCore.la] Error 1


This same error occurs with other graphics applications (eg; gimp-app).
